topic: A close-up of a Tesla Cybertruck driving through a puddle, low angle.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Low-angle close-up of the Cybertruck front as it drives through a puddle, water splashing.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Side-angle tracking shot along the Cybertruck as it powers through the puddle, spray arcing along its body.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Front-view of the Cybertruck cutting through the puddle, angular silhouette emerging from spray.
parsed_generation.narration: Eight seconds unfold as the Cybertruck carves through a puddle from three angles: a low-angle close-up leads, then a side-angle tracking shot, and finally a front view as it powers through spray.

feedback:
Overall structure captures the requested topic with three camera-angle moments, but formatting diverges from the gold standard. The output uses labeled Shot 1/Shot 2 and nonstandard timestamps; it would benefit from a clean, bracketed timestamp sequence like [00:00-00:03], [00:03-00:06], [00:06-00:08], and from richer details such as tire splash and reflections. Including an SFX line similar to the gold standard would further align with the reference style.

strengths: Clear three-shot sequence with distinct angles (low-angle, side-tracking, front-view).
fixes: Remove Shot labels and standardize timestamp blocks to match gold-standard format.
Add more visual richness: tire splash magnitude, puddle interaction, reflections on stainless steel, and optional SFX cues.
